metadata.description: A set of starter plugins for your Cursor trial.

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Git workflows for commit, PR, CI, merge conflicts, and branch validation

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation workflows for README, weekly review, markdown naming, and doc writing

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: PM workflows with Jira MCP integration, ticket writing, and board summarization

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design workflows for wireframes, component design, and mockup creation

plugins.name: testing-reliability
plugins.description: Testing and reliability workflows for Datadog, performance, and test automation
